---
title: Des citrons
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784140767/citrons2_rgunyn.png
description: Cours sur la gouache de Manero
categories: ["urbansketch"]
date: 2026/07/12
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784140767/citrons2_rgunyn.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
